sections.heading: PCBWay Plug-In for OpenSCAD
sections.text: Blog > PCBWay Plug-In for OpenSCAD PCBWay Plug-In for OpenSCAD by: PCBWay Oct 24,2024 8251 Views 0 Comments Posted in News We are excited to announce that we have welcomed a new partner! PCBWay has recently collaborated with OpenSCAD to integrate the PCBWay plug-in into the software. This means that from now on, users can directly jump to the PCBWay page from OpenSCAD to place orders, which will greatly improve the efficiency of pre-production preparation work. OpenSCAD download link ( https://openscad.org/ ) After completing the design in OpenSCAD, click Design -> 3D print. In the newly popped-up dialog box, select PCBWay, and then click OK. Then it will be automatically redirected to PCBW...
